case_title: FELISA VASQUEZ VS. JOSE ANTONIO GORDILLO FUENTES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, FELISA AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, JOSE ANTONIO GORDILLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO BRING HER OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
